entry.data:
MOSTLY CLOUDY
NEAR STEADY TEMPERATURE IN THE UPPER 60S
SOUTH WINDS AROUND 15 MPH WITH GUSTS UP TO 25 MPH

MOSTLY CLOUDY
SHOWERS LIKELY WITH A CHANCE OF THUNDERSTORMS IN THE AFTERNOON
BREEZY WITH HIGHS IN THE UPPER 70S
SOUTH WINDS 15 TO 25 MPH WITH GUSTS UP TO 45 MPH
CHANCE OF RAIN 60 PERCENT

PARTLY CLOUDY
A CHANCE OF SHOWERS AND THUNDERSTORMS IN THE EVENING, THEN SHOWERS LIKELY AFTER MIDNIGHT
LOWS IN THE MID 60S
SOUTH WINDS 15 TO 20 MPH WITH GUSTS UP TO 30 MPH
CHANCE OF RAIN 60 PERCENT

PARTLY SUNNY WITH A CHANCE OF SHOWERS AND THUNDERSTORMS
HIGHS IN THE LOWER 80S
SOUTH WINDS 15 TO 20 MPH
CHANCE OF RAIN 50 PERCENT

MOSTLY CLOUDY
A CHANCE OF SHOWERS IN THE EVENING, THEN SHOWERS WITH A CHANCE OF THUNDERSTORMS AFTER MIDNIGHT
LOWS IN THE LOWER 60S
SOUTH WINDS 10 TO 15 MPH WITH GUSTS UP TO 25 MPH
CHANCE OF RAIN 90 PERCENT

SHOWERS WITH A CHANCE OF THUNDERSTORMS IN THE MORNING, THEN A CHANCE OF SHOWERS IN THE AFTERNOON
HIGHS IN THE UPPER 60S
CHANCE OF RAIN 90 PERCENT

MOSTLY CLOUDY IN THE EVENING, THEN CLEARING
MUCH COOLER WITH LOWS AROUND 40

CLEAR
HIGHS AROUND 60
LOWS IN THE UPPER 30S

PARTLY CLOUDY
LOWS IN THE LOWER 40S
HIGHS IN THE LOWER 60S

MOSTLY CLEAR
LOWS IN THE UPPER 30S

MOSTLY SUNNY
HIGHS IN THE UPPER 60S
